input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-4] Two large subwoofers with black cones and silver trim sit in a grey carpeted box at the top of a car trunk. Below, two amplifiers rest on the grey floor; the left amplifier is black with a silver faceplate labeled Kenwood, while the right unit has a silver metallic casing. [4-8] The camera pans rapidly to the right, blurring the subwoofers and amplifiers, then points down at grey asphalt pavement marked by a long, dark crack. The camera lifts to reveal a blue car's exterior side with yellow stripes. [8-10] The camera returns to the open trunk, showing the subwoofers and amplifiers inside the grey carpeted area with a crumpled cloth in the foreground. [10-14] The view shifts to the open rear passenger door, displaying a beige interior panel with a tan seatbelt hanging diagonally. Outside, a street scene reveals a maroon minivan, a silver sedan, and a bright yellow sports car parked along the curb near the dark teal vehicle.

[14-16] The camera moves from the exterior door sill into the vehicle's cabin, revealing a beige cloth driver's seat and a matching beige dashboard with black floor mats beneath. The open door panel with tan upholstery frames the right side. [16-18] Panning right across the dashboard reveals a center console with black climate controls and a gear shift lever, alongside a partially visible steering wheel and instrument cluster on the left. The passenger side dashboard comes into view, showing a rectangular air vent and "SRS" embossed on the glove compartment door. [18-24] The camera pushes in for a static close-up on the beige passenger-side dashboard, centering on the glove compartment door where "SRS" is clearly embossed. To the right, a rectangular air vent with horizontal slats is prominent, and a small latch is centered on the lower panel below the text.

[24-28] The camera pulls back from the beige passenger dashboard to reveal the center console with black climate controls, a gear shift, the "SRS" logo, and the beige driver's seat edge. [28-32] The camera tilts up to show black weather stripping, green grass, a sidewalk, and a dark teal hood, then tilts down to the beige dashboard, door panel, and black floor mat. [32-36] The angle shifts left to the center console, then pans rapidly left, blurring past a black steering wheel and a red and yellow beverage can. [36-38] The camera stabilizes on the full front interior, showing the black radio controls, gear shift, and the beige dashboard with the "SRS" emblem.

recent_thinks: [38-40] The camera pans slightly right, revealing more of the open door jamb and hinge area. The beige dashboard with the "SRS" logo remains central. The black center console, gear shift, and radio controls are visible on the left. A black floor mat covers the footwell. The beige door panel is seen on the far right edge.

queries.question: How many times does the video show a car audio equipment setup?

[4-8] The camera pans rapidly to the right, blurring the subwoofers and amplifiers, then points down at grey asphalt pavement marked by a long, dark crack. The camera lifts to reveal a blue car's exterior side with yellow stripes. [8-10] The camera returns to the open trunk, showing the subwoofers and amplifiers inside the grey carpeted area with a crumpled cloth in the foreground. [10-14] The view shifts to the open rear passenger door, displaying a beige interior panel with a tan seatbelt hanging diagonally. Outside, a street scene reveals a maroon minivan, a silver sedan, and a bright yellow sports car parked along the curb near the dark teal vehicle. [14-16] The camera moves from the exterior door sill into the vehicle's cabin, revealing a beige cloth driver's seat and a matching beige dashboard with black floor mats beneath. The open door panel with tan upholstery frames the

[54-58] Camera pans from beige passenger dashboard to black steering wheel and instrument cluster, showing a patterned beverage can near the black center console. View pulls back to reveal beige interior and open driver's door, then shifts to side window reflections. [58-60] Exterior view shows teal car body, black weather stripping, and glossy paint along the door edge. [60-66] Camera moves to open trunk, revealing a large grey carpeted box housing two subwoofers with black cones and red logos. Two silver amplifiers with black cooling fins sit on the trunk floor. To the right, a green battery box with exposed wiring and a white cloth are visible near the latch.

[66-72] The camera holds steady on the trunk interior, displaying a grey carpeted enclosure with two subwoofers having black cones and red logos. Below, amplifiers rest on the floor, while a green battery box with exposed wiring and a white cloth sit to the right near the trunk latch. [72-74] The camera pulls back and pans slightly left, revealing the full dual subwoofer enclosure and the amplifiers. [74-76] The view tilts upward to focus on the black rubber weather stripping lining the trunk opening, secured by silver clips. [76-78] The camera pulls back to show the entire open trunk, framing the grey carpeted box, the black and silver amplifiers, and the teal car exterior.

[78-82] The camera holds steady on the open trunk interior, displaying a grey carpeted box housing two subwoofers with black cones and red logos. Below, silver and black amplifiers rest on the trunk floor, while a green battery box with wiring sits near the teal vehicle's edge.
[82-84] The camera zooms in on a black and silver Kenwood amplifier labeled "1800W" on the grey carpet. Behind it, the large grey enclosure housing two subwoofers remains stationary, while a second amplifier sits to the right.
[84-86] The camera tilts upward to the trunk opening's black rubber weather stripping, secured by silver clips. The upper portions of the two subwoofer cones are visible beneath the stripping.
[86-90] Tilting down reveals the full grey carpeted subwoofer enclosure with two speakers featuring black cones, red center logos, and silver trim rings. Silver and black amplifiers rest below, with green painted metal and wiring visible on the right.

[90-96] A steady shot shows a teal Pontiac Grand Prix trunk with "PONTIAC GRAND PRIX" text. A grey carpeted enclosure with dual vertical ports houses two AudioBahn subwoofers with black cones and red logos. Below, distinct silver and black KENWOOD amplifiers labeled "1800W" rest on the trunk floor. [96-100] The camera angles right, revealing green painted side panel and exposed wiring within the trunk's right corner, while the enclosure remains central. [100-102] The view tilts up to reveal black rubber weather stripping lining the top edge, then pans right to show silver sound deadening material on the interior wall.

A black steering wheel sits left of a beige cloth driver's seat. The open driver's door panel, with black window controls, is visible on the right.

[102-104] The camera pans slightly right, exposing the trunk's side wall painted green with attached silver foil insulation. The grey carpeted enclosure housing two subwoofers with black cones and red logos stays central, resting above the silver and black amplifiers on the grey carpeted floor.

[104-106] The camera pans further to the right side of the vehicle interior, briefly showing a cardboard box filled with indistinct white and blue objects. The view then settles on a large expanse of grey fabric, appearing to be a seat cover or blanket, which dominates the frame while the audio equipment disappears from view.

[106-108] The camera focuses on a large, folded grey fabric item, resembling carpet or a seat cover, resting inside the vehicle. To the left, a white box containing indistinct objects is partially visible against the dark green painted paneling. The audio equipment seen previously is now out of frame as the view centers on these stored items.

[108-110] The camera pans right, shifting focus from the grey fabric and white box to the trunk's green painted wall lined with silver sound deadening material. The edge of the grey carpeted subwoofer enclosure appears on the right, while the fabric remains visible on the left edge.

input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

[4-8] The camera pans rapidly to the right, blurring the subwoofers and amplifiers, then points down at grey asphalt pavement marked by a long, dark crack. The camera lifts to reveal a blue car's exterior side with yellow stripes. [8-10] The camera returns to the open trunk, showing the subwoofers and amplifiers inside the grey carpeted area with a crumpled cloth in the foreground. [10-14] The view shifts to the open rear passenger door, displaying a beige interior panel with a tan seatbelt hanging diagonally. Outside, a street scene reveals a maroon minivan, a silver sedan, and a bright yellow sports car parked along the curb near the dark teal vehicle. [14-16] The camera moves from the exterior door sill into the vehicle's cabin, revealing a beige cloth driver's seat and a matching beige dashboard with black floor mats beneath. The open door panel with tan upholstery frames the

[90-96] A steady shot shows a teal Pontiac Grand Prix trunk with "PONTIAC GRAND PRIX" text. A grey carpeted enclosure with dual vertical ports houses two AudioBahn subwoofers with black cones and red logos. Below, distinct silver and black KENWOOD amplifiers labeled "1800W" rest on the trunk floor. [96-100] The camera angles right, revealing green painted side panel and exposed wiring within the trunk's right corner, while the enclosure remains central. [100-102] The view tilts up to reveal black rubber weather stripping lining the top edge, then pans right to show silver sound deadening material on the interior wall.

[102-104] The camera pans slightly right, exposing the trunk's green side wall with silver foil insulation. A grey carpeted enclosure housing two subwoofers with black cones and red logos stays central, resting above silver and black amplifiers on the grey carpeted floor. [104-108] The camera pans further right, briefly showing a cardboard box with indistinct white and blue objects, then settling on a large grey fabric item resembling a seat cover, while a white box is visible against dark green paneling. [108-114] The camera shifts focus from the fabric to the trunk's green wall lined with silver insulation tape. The grey carpeted subwoofer enclosure becomes prominent, displaying a speaker with a black cone, silver trim ring, and red logo.

[114-116] The camera moves to the trunk's right corner, showing a green painted wall with silver insulation tape and a grey carpeted subwoofer enclosure with a speaker featuring a black cone, silver trim, and red logo. [116-118] The view tilts up past black rubber weather stripping to the rear window shelf, revealing a beige carpeted surface with a bright, blurry white circular light reflection. [118-126] Tilting down, the camera reveals a grey carpeted enclosure housing two subwoofers with black cones, red logos, and silver trim rings. Below, silver and black amplifiers rest on the floor, one displaying text. To the right, the green painted wall features silver insulation tape and exposed wiring. The camera maintains a steady close-up of this audio system.

[126-128] A steady view displays a grey carpeted enclosure holding two subwoofers with black cones and red AudioBahn logos, positioned above silver and black amplifiers on the trunk floor next to a green wall with silver insulation tape. [128-130] The camera tilts upward, revealing black rubber weather stripping along the trunk lid edge secured by silver clips, with the upper portions of the subwoofers visible below. [130-136] The view tilts downward to a steady wide shot of the audio system, capturing the enclosure, amplifiers, green wall section with tape, and the black trunk seal at the top. [136-138] The camera pans left, showing the green painted side panel with silver insulation on the left, angling the subwoofer enclosure to the right.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-4] Two large subwoofers with black cones and silver trim sit in a grey carpeted box at the top of a car trunk. Below, two amplifiers rest on the grey floor; the left amplifier is black with a silver faceplate labeled Kenwood, while the right unit has a silver metallic casing. [4-8] The camera pans rapidly to the right, blurring the subwoofers and amplifiers, then points down at grey asphalt pavement marked by a long, dark crack. The camera lifts to reveal a blue car's exterior side with yellow stripes. [8-10] The camera returns to the open trunk, showing the subwoofers and amplifiers inside the grey carpeted area with a crumpled cloth in the foreground. [10-14] The view shifts to the open rear passenger door, displaying a beige interior panel with a tan seatbelt hanging diagonally. Outside, a street scene reveals a maroon minivan, a silver sedan, and a bright yellow sports car parked along the curb near the dark teal vehicle. [14-16] The camera moves from the exterior door sill into the vehicle's cabin, revealing a beige cloth driver's seat and a matching beige dashboard with black floor mats beneath. The open door panel with tan upholstery frames the

[162-164] The camera zooms in significantly on a silver and black amplifier on the left trunk floor, rendering "KENWOOD" and "1800W" clearly legible while subwoofers are pushed to the top edge. [164-172] The shot holds a steady close-up on the faceplate, revealing "500W" and "KAC-9103D" text alongside gold-plated connection terminals at the bottom, with the subwoofers remaining mostly out of frame against the dark carpet background.

[174-180] The camera maintains a steady close-up on a silver Kenwood amplifier faceplate, clearly displaying "KENWOOD", "1800W", "500W", and the model number "KAC-9103D". Gold-plated connection terminals line the bottom edge against the dark grey carpet background, highlighting the brushed metal finish and black casing. [180-182] The frame widens as the camera zooms out, revealing a second silver amplifier resting nearby on the grey carpet, showing the metallic faceplates and black casings of the dual-amplifier setup. [182-184] The view shifts to focus on the lower unit, a silver amplifier faceplate labeled "KENWOOD" on the left and "KAC-8402" on the right, positioned below another similar silver amplifier with gold terminals visible along the bottom.

[184-186] A close-up view focuses on a silver Kenwood amplifier faceplate labeled "KAC-8402" on the right, with a row of gold connection terminals along the bottom edge set against dark grey trunk carpet. [186-188] The camera pans to reveal a large subwoofer mounted in a grey carpeted enclosure, featuring a textured black cone, a silver trim ring, and a central dust cap with a red logo and white "Audiobahn" text. [188-190] Focus returns to a silver Kenwood amplifier faceplate, clearly displaying "1800W" text and gold-plated connection terminals along the bottom. [190-192] The camera pulls back to show a dual-amplifier setup on the trunk floor, with the Kenwood unit on the left and a second silver amplifier adjacent to its right, both lined with gold terminals.

The camera tilts upward from silver amplifiers, one displaying "KENWOOD 1800W", on the trunk floor to a grey carpeted subwoofer enclosure against the rear window. Two black subwoofers with silver trim rings and red center logos are visible in the box, separated by rectangular vent slots. The rear glass, parcel shelf, and black rubber weather stripping appear at the top. Panning slightly left reveals a green painted metal interior wall on the left, while the enclosure remains central below the window seal.

The grey carpeted subwoofer enclosure with black speakers and silver trim remains central, positioned below the rear window's black rubber seal. queries.question: Which text is embossed on the upper section of the beige dashboard panel? A. KICKER B. SRS C. KENWOOD D. AudioControl
